dataList.name: Let the Blood Festival Flow
dataList.desc: The battle proceeds to the next phase after all the Clay Dolls are defeated

dataList.name: Let the Fire Festival Ignite
dataList.desc: If both Arms are destroyed or the main body’s HP is brought to 70%, the battle proceeds to the next phase

dataList.name: Frenzy
dataList.desc: During phase 3, inflict 7 [Combustion] on all enemies every turn

dataList.name: Let the Star Festival Fall
dataList.desc: When the Core HP is brought to 25% or lower, the battle proceeds to the next phase

dataList.name: Idolatry
dataList.desc:
Does not die at 0 HP; instead, remains on the stage as an immobile and untargetable unit.
Suppressed when the Doomsday Calendar is suppressed

dataList.name: Returning Past
dataList.desc: At 50+ [AccumulatedPastMirror], and if Core HP is at 80%-, the Core heals 200 HP by consuming 50 [AccumulatedPastMirror] at Turn End

dataList.name: Misplaced Past
dataList.desc:
When the Body is broken, consume all [AccumulatedPastMirror]
When the Body is broken, starting next turn, all Attack Types and Affinities become Ineffective(0.5) for the rest of the Encounter

dataList.name: Broken Exhaust Port
dataList.desc:
When Steam Blaster is broken, completely lose [Breath] on all parts
Once Steam Blaster is broken, every time this unit gains [Breath], gain [Vulnerable] for every [Breath] gained
Once Steam Blaster is broken, lose 1 [Breath] On Use of an Attack Skill

dataList.name: Leaking Steam
dataList.desc: When Steam Blaster is hit, lose 1 [Breath] and 1 [Breath] Count

dataList.name: Metronome
dataList.desc:
If the [AccumulatedPastMirror] is an odd number, gain 3 [Vulnerable] and [AttackDmgUp]
If it is an even number, gain 3 [Protection] and [AttackDmgDown]

dataList.name: Vigorous Volaille
dataList.desc: Turn End: Heal 5 HP for every Raw Chicken on the field

dataList.name: Gloomy Gallus
dataList.desc: Turn End: Deal 5 SP damage to all enemies for every Raw Chicken on the field

dataList.name: Fragile Fowl
dataList.desc: When a Part breaks, gain 1 [Vulnerable] every turn for every Raw Chicken that died before that Part was broken

dataList.name: Powerful Poussin
dataList.desc: If the Part isn’t broken, gain 1 [AttackDmgUp] every turn for every surviving Raw Chicken

dataList.name: Bongy Chicken Struts
dataList.desc: Turn End: Deal 3 SP damage to a random enemy

dataList.name: Bongy Chicken Beefs Up
dataList.desc: Turn End: Apply 2 [AttackDmgUp] and 2 [Protection] to all allies next turn, including this unit

dataList.name: Blood Sac
dataList.desc:
If this unit has [BloodPocket]:
- The Body's Wrath Resist. -50%
- The Body's Gloom Resist. +50%

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: If this unit has [WaterPocket], heal its Core by (Stack x 20)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's [Laceration] once and reduce [Laceration] Count by 1

dataList.name: Splash Around
dataList.desc:
Apply 1 [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] on the target that Clashed against this unit's Skill using a Skill that has the same Attack Type as this unit's (once per Skill, 3 times per turn)
- If it was a Blunt Skill, apply 2 [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] instead

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: If this unit has [WaterPocket], heal its Core by (Stack x 30)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's [Laceration] twice and reduce [Laceration] Count by 2

dataList.name: Blood Sac
dataList.desc:
If this unit has [BloodPocket]:
- The Body's Wrath Resist. -35%
- The Body's Gloom Resist. +35%

dataList.name: Fluid Sac
dataList.desc: If this unit has [WaterPocket], heal its Core by (Stack x 35)

dataList.name: Ruptured Blood Sac
dataList.desc: Once the Body is broken, on Clash Win, activate the enemy's [Laceration] thrice and reduce [Laceration] Count by 3

dataList.name: SplishSplashSplish
dataList.desc:
If target does not have [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- Deal +80% damage
- On Hit using a Skill's final Coin, trigger [VibrationExplosion]; then, reduce target's [Vibration] Count by 1

If target has [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- Deal -50% damage
- Take +10% damage for every [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror] Stack on target (max 100%)

If no one has [PlayingWithWaterTogetherMirror], gain the following effects:
- On Hit using a Skill, inflict 5 [Laceration]
- On Hit using a Skill's final Coin, activate [Laceration] once; then, reduce target's [Laceration] Count by 1
